title: dortmanna chinensis
intro: Dortmanna chinensis, also known as the Chinese maidenhair fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Adiantaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dortmanna chinensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and lower blood pressure, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and improve liver function. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
